title: Visualisation on Percentage
excerpt: Now, I have created a status bar showing proposals submitted on time / late. I want to automate their percentage of On time / (On time + Late), to see how much their proposals are on time. Is there a way to do it? Kindly…

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml: Now, I have created a status bar showing proposals submitted on time / late. I want to automate their percentage of On time / (On time + Late), to see how much their proposals are on time. Is there a way to do it? Kindly help me with step to step guide. Thanks A lot!!!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

This is a perfect use case for The Progress Tracking Column!

This column will show you percentages of what is “complete”, “stuck”, “working on it”, etc.

Have you tried adding it? Let us know what you think!
